allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
docs: Update documentation to reflect current infrastructure state

Comprehensively updated documentation based on analysis of git history,
module structure, and current service deployments.

CLAUDE.md changes:
- Updated host architecture with current IPs and full service listings
- Added detailed module descriptions including new nordvpn module
- Documented ZFS "Erase Your Darlings" pattern on ser8
- Added Service Access section with all domain mappings
- Noted qBittorrent replaced Transmission with VPN isolation
- Expanded development notes with user management patterns

README.md changes:
- Transformed into comprehensive overview with infrastructure details
- Added Quick Start section for common operations
- Documented all service URLs and access methods
- Expanded DNS configuration testing procedures
- Added Key Features section highlighting ZFS, VPN, monitoring

TODO.md changes:
- Marked 12 completed items based on git history
- Added 10 new items discovered during review
- Reorganized with completion status and explanations
- Added new section for items from documentation review

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")

Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
docs: Add comprehensive architectural analysis and implementation plans

Created detailed planning documents analyzing gaps between desired features
and actual implementation, with prioritized remediation strategies.

Plans created:
- 00-executive-summary.md: Overall health assessment (6/10 score)
- 01-storage-architecture.md: Storage analysis and solutions
- 02-firebat-impermanence.md: ZFS migration plan for gateway
- 03-monitoring-secrets.md: Monitoring gaps and secrets management
- 04-implementation-roadmap.md: Prioritized action plan
- 05-overlay-pattern-analysis.md: Nix overlays research
- 06-media-storage-architecture.md: ext4+MergerFS vs ZFS analysis
- README.md: Index and quick reference

Key findings:
- Backup ZFS pool (4x6TB RAID-Z2) defined but may not auto-import
- Media drives confirmed mounted (ext4+MergerFS optimal for workload)
- Monitoring infrastructure incomplete (exporters exist, dashboards missing)
- firebat lacks ZFS impermanence pattern (ext4 only)
- Missing API keys for media service monitoring
- AllDebrid uses local path (should use overlay)

Recommendations:
- Priority 1: Investigate and fix backup pool mounting
- Priority 2: Add missing secrets and complete monitoring
- Priority 3: Migrate firebat to ZFS impermanence
- Keep media storage as ext4+MergerFS (add SMART monitoring)
- Implement overlays for AllDebrid and hardware optimizations

All plans include step-by-step procedures, testing checklists, rollback
strategies, and time estimates.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")
